basic_details.job_title: NIT Tiruchirappalli Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology, Tiruchirappalli (NIT Trichy)
basic_details.application_mode: Post or Email (Soft copy as single PDF)
basic_details.short_information: NIT Trichy is recruiting 1 Project Assistant post with M.E/M.Tech qualification, last date 15 July 2026 (Extended).

age_limit.age_details: Centre for Artificial Intelligence and Robotics, DRDO

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: 35 years (Age relaxation as per norms) | job description: Research Oriented
qualification.education_qualification: M.E / M.Tech in CSE / IT / ECE

vacancy_details.details: Total Posts: 1 Project Title: Efficient Provenance Log Collector for Linux Systems

selection_process: Candidates must ensure they fulfill the eligibility criteria before applying. Shortlisted candidates will be called for interview at the Department of CSE. Selection will be based on qualifications
and performance in the interview. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Original certificates must be produced at the time of interview for verification.
how_to_apply: Candidates should submit the duly filled application in the prescribed format (FORM No. 8) along with all supporting documents:
By Post to the Office of the Principal Investigator, or
As a soft copy (single PDF file) via email to [email protected] or [email protected]
The application must reach on or before 15.07.2026 (Extended).
important_instructions: Only Indian Nationals are eligible. Application should be in the prescribed format only. Experience certificates, degree certificates, and other relevant documents must be attached. Minimum 14 days’ notice for regular interview and 05 days for walk-in. The position is temporary and co-terminus with the project. No TA/DA is admissible.

content_sections.text: Candidates must ensure they fulfill the eligibility criteria before applying. Shortlisted candidates will be called for interview at the Department of CSE. Selection will be based on qualifications, experience, and performance in the interview. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Original certificates must be produced at the time of interview for verification.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for NIT Tiruchirappalli Project Assistant Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Only Indian Nationals are eligible. Application should be in the prescribed format only. Experience certificates, degree certificates, and other relevant documents must be attached. Minimum 14 days’ notice for regular interview and 05 days for walk-in. The position is temporary and co-terminus with the project. No TA/DA is admissible.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Trichy Project Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of application has been extended to 15 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Project Assistant at NIT Tiruchirappalli?
faq.answer: The emoluments are Rs. 25,000 per month.

faq.question: Q3. What qualifications are required for NIT Trichy Project Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have M.E / M.Tech in CSE / IT / ECE.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available in NIT Trichy Project Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: There is 01 (One) vacancy for the Project Assistant position.

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for NIT Trichy DRDO Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Send the prescribed application form along with documents by post or as a single PDF to [email protected] or [email protected] before 15 July 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the project duration for NIT Trichy Project Assistant?
faq.answer: The project is initially for 6 months, extendable up to 24 months.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for NIT Tiruchirappalli Project Assistant Recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 35 years with relaxation as per norms.

faq.question: Q8. When is the interview for NIT Trichy Project Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: The tentative interview date is 22 July 2026 at the Department of CSE.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for NIT Trichy Project Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee is required.

faq.question: Q10. What is the funding agency for the NIT Trichy Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The project is funded by Centre for Artificial Intelligence and Robotics, DRDO.
